articles.summary: SummarySEGA has announced Crazy Taxi World Tour, a reboot of the classic arcade racing series scheduled to launch in 2027The title will launch across PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S, PC and Nintendo's upcoming successor consoleThe reveal trailer confirmed the return of original driver Axel alongside an iconic soundtrack featuring The OffspringSEGA officially revealed Crazy Taxi World Tour during the 2026 Xbox Games Showcase. The announcement provided the first major update on the franchise in years. The upcoming reboot is slated for a 2027 release. It will span multiple platforms including Steam, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S and the Nintendo Switch 2. The project marks the first significant console entry for the series since the early 2000s. articles.summary: Name: Concrete Boys x Nike Air Force 1 MidSKU: TBCRelease Date: 2026First look at images of Lil Yachty's Concrete Boys x Nike Air Force 1 Mid sneaker has surfaced. The unisex release takes a quieter approach than earlier Mind 002 pairs, most visibly in the decision to match the pressure-point pods to the rest of the shoe rather than using the bright orange that has defined the silhouette's most recognizable colorways.The pod swap is the colorway's central design statement. The Mind 002's columned midsole and podded outsole have typically appeared in a contrasting color that draws attention to the shoe's neuroscience-backed pressure-point system, making the recovery technology visible as an aesthetic feature. Photon Dust leather covers the toe box, side panels, and collar, laying down a soft off-white base across the upper's largest surfaces.
